title: Mandalorian
description: Mandalorian replaces various Netherite ﻿related textures including armour, tools and weapons.
body: ![Mandalorian Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa9356b0c6a2d316c7e910b81a34d571728e224f_0.webp) # A MANDALORIAN Inhospitable lands, never-ending wars, galactic cartels are all an everyday occurrence for you. Despite these challenges you still persist. Never bowing down because you are a Mandalorian. # FEATURES - replaces Netherite armour with Mandalorian armour - replaces Netherite weapons with Beskar weapons - replaces Netherite tools with Beskar tools - replaces Netherite blocks and ingots with Beskar ![DFP License Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f28dce390848e790af498daacd282533ec0bb5cf.png) # GAME VERSIONS - 1.19 - 1.21.3 # DEVELOPER NOTES This texture pack was originally posted by me on Planet Minecraft some time ago. I've decided to renew the texture pack and will post newer versions on here. [Original post]([https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/beskar-texture-pack/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/beskar-texture-pack/)) # LINKS ![Ko-Fi Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81578c476131e8d131dc7aa2b58857525ea4f9af.png) ![Website Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d733ec80f664d05d32e895120b27255af2c43f4.png) ![Updates Button](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60f52b867a52a022b51e68dbba88e87fc4c5cdf.png)
